subcategory: SVG underline animation with draw-on effect
use_cases: Animated text decoration for headlines and section titles
Landing page hero section visual enhancement
ai_summary: A decorative SVG underline animation component that uses GSAP's DrawSVGPlugin to create a smooth draw-on effect. The component cycles through multiple pre-defined path variants to produce organic, varied underline strokes for text emphasis. Ideal for adding visual interest to headlines, CTAs, and landing page typography in any SaaS or product-focused application.
